scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev" "sleep 3 && cd electron && npx electron ."
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:mac
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:win
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:linux
